newsSince: No new fundamental news since June 9. The Schall Law Firm fiduciary-duty investigation and the prior accounting-restatement/insider-selling context were already in the June 9 prior case; there has been no escalation, settlement or guidance change since. The ~-7% move since June 9 is governance/valuation-driven, not a thesis change.

sources.label: Legal probe puts MPWR governance under review (Yahoo)
MPWR restatement & governance scrutiny (Simply Wall St)

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha lens: governance overhang (Schall probe, restatement) persists but is not new since June 9. Crowded/rerated benchmark with maxed visibility; small negative drift for lingering governance risk, no second consecutive move.
verdicts.bull: High-current PDN around accelerators is a hard-to-substitute, direct-AI 2026 bottleneck.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but crowded/rerated; governance noise without escalation.
verdicts.bear: Restatement + fiduciary probe + ~$380M peak insider selling cap residual alpha on a 52% YTD name.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Continued AI server power-density content gains
verdicts.primaryRisk: Governance/restatement litigation overhang at peak valuation

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node bottleneck lens cares about directness vs HBM/packaging/networking, which is unchanged. The Schall probe is governance noise that does not alter node-bottleneck directness; prior case already cut it on directness grounds.
verdicts.bull: Selective AI/edge/power exposure with real accelerator-adjacent content.
verdicts.neutral: Less direct than HBM, advanced packaging and AI-networking peers.
verdicts.bear: Power/analog tier sits a step removed from the core AI-node bottleneck.

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO-specific lens: MPWR has low co-packaged-optics exposure, already demoted near the bottom. Governance headlines are consistent with that placement; no CPO-relevant change in window, little reason to move.
verdicts.bull: AI power-density beneficiary as optics modules raise board-level power needs.
verdicts.neutral: Indirect CPO read-through; mostly a power/analog play.
verdicts.bear: Minimal co-packaged-optics content; high valuation plus governance overhang.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Higher power delivery around CPO/optical line cards

verdicts.rankRationale: Under-owned-bottleneck master list: board-level power & passives content thesis unchanged. Schall probe is incremental governance noise, not a thesis change; rerating already penalized. Hold.
verdicts.bull: AI server PDN, MLCC and inductor content compounds with accelerator ramps.
verdicts.neutral: Balanced bottleneck exposure vs already-rerated 52% YTD valuation.
verdicts.bear: Crowded rerating plus governance/restatement overhang limit scarce-alpha appeal.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Power-delivery content gains in AI servers
